category_sources: source_facts.description says Kondo saves disk space by cleaning non-essential files from software projects.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kondo; source_facts.homepage points to the official tbillington/kondo project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best official documentation surface identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/tbillington/kondo, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies disk cleanup for software projects; source_facts.executables lists the kondo CLI.
